message:
test(engine): expand specialization conformance integration tests and
refine attack surface game model and benchmark gate tests

- specialization_conformance_integration.rs (+405 lines): major
  expansion of specialization conformance verification covering
  additional type specialization paths, generic instantiation
  correctness, and conformance edge cases
- sibling_integration_benchmark_gate.rs (+8 lines): refined benchmark
  gate sibling integration scenarios
- attack_surface_game_model_enrichment_integration.rs (+4 lines):
  minor attack surface model enrichment refinements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
